caption: A medical simulation takes place in a clinical setting featuring a medical mannequin with red hair lying in a hospital bed. The mannequin is covered with a grey blanket decorated with small red and blue crescent moons. A person wearing blue gloves is visible on the right side of the frame, holding a white piece of paper above the mannequin. In the background, a black computer monitor and a white equipment stand with red bottles are visible. On-screen text in the bottom left corner reads "Day 1" inside a purple circle, and text in the bottom right corner reads "Sim Week" next to a purple logo. Across the sequence of frames, there is very little movement; the person's hand and the piece of paper shift slightly, and the overall scene remains static.
